name: Barcode & QR Scanning
promptInjection:
CAPABILITY: Barcode & QR Scanning (AVFoundation Metadata)
For live barcode/QR scanning from the camera feed:

SETUP:
- Use AVCaptureMetadataOutput (NOT Vision framework) for real-time scanning — it is faster and purpose-built.
- Add AVCaptureDeviceInput (.video) and AVCaptureMetadataOutput to an AVCaptureSession.
- CRITICAL: Set metadataObjectTypes AFTER adding the output to the session: output.metadataObjectTypes = [.qr, .ean13, .ean8, .code128]. Setting them before adding the output will crash.
- Use AVCaptureVideoPreviewLayer wrapped in UIViewRepresentable for the live preview.
- Start session on a background queue.

DELEGATE:
- Implement AVCaptureMetadataOutputObjectsDelegate in a Coordinator or dedicated class.
- In metadataOutput(_:didOutput:from:), extract stringValue from AVMetadataMachineReadableCodeObject.
- Dispatch results to main thread for UI updates.

DUPLICATE PREVENTION:
- After a successful scan, set a flag and ignore scans for 1.5 seconds (cooldown timer).
- Use UIImpactFeedbackGenerator(style: .medium).impactOccurred() for haptic feedback on scan.

FALLBACK:
- Include a "Enter manually" TextField below the scanner for simulator testing and accessibility.
- Check AVCaptureDevice.default(for: .video) != nil before setup — show a placeholder on simulator.

TORCH:
- Toggle torch: device.torchMode = device.isTorchActive ? .off : .on (inside try device.lockForConfiguration() / device.unlockForConfiguration()).

ANTI-PATTERNS:
- Do NOT use VisionKit DataScannerViewController for simple barcode scanning — it is heavier and less customizable.
- Do NOT use Vision VNDetectBarcodesRequest for live scanning — AVCaptureMetadataOutput is faster.
- Do NOT forget metadataObjectTypes — default is empty, so nothing will be detected.
- Do NOT call session.startRunning() on the main thread.
antiPatterns: Using Vision VNDetectBarcodesRequest for live camera scanning (use AVCaptureMetadataOutput)
Setting metadataObjectTypes before adding output to session (crashes)
Calling session.startRunning() on the main thread (UI freeze)
Forgetting to set metadataObjectTypes (default is empty — nothing detected)
Not providing a manual entry fallback for simulator or accessibility

commonErrors: value of type 'Booking' has no member 'carColorColor'
missing argument for parameter 'height' in call
'nil' cannot be used in context expecting type 'Int'
